candidate: L17 NLP DISCLOSURE-TYPE-conditioned forward-return FORWARD-SCAFFOLD (pre-registered + offline-validated). A genuinely new factor AXIS (text classification / event-type taxonomy), explicitly named in the directive (NLP) but never opened as a track. DISTINCT from L16 sentiment-polarity: here the signal is WHICH KAP disclosure TYPE a name just filed (buyback vs capital-increase vs rating vs dividend vs governance ...), and whether a given type predicts subsequent market-relative drift. NLP-LITE = a pre-registered keyword taxonomy (not a tuned model). Multiple-testing controlled (Bonferroni across types). Scaffold-only, committed-engine ZERO-touch, repo READ-ONLY, NO network, ASCII.
hypothesis: Specific KAP disclosure TYPES carry information about subsequent returns (e.g., buyback announcements -> positive drift; rights-issue / capital-increase -> negative drift), independent of a single polarity score. DEPLOYABLE form: long the names that just filed a positive-information type, in the LIQUID universe, market-relative, net of cost; significant after Bonferroni across the tested type set.

signal_FROZEN.definition: Classify each disclosure headline into ONE of a PRE-REGISTERED type taxonomy via ASCII-folded keyword matching; event = (symbol, day-stamp, type). Test each type's [+1,+H] market-relative CAR vs zero with event-clustered NW-t, and the cross-type ranking.
signal_FROZEN.no_price_in_signal: Type is derived from disclosure text only -> orthogonal to the price/volume/fundamental graveyard and to L1-L16. New AXIS (event-type classification).

look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.rule: t+1 entry after the day-stamp, holding [+1,+H]; announcement-day return EXCLUDED; market-relative (subtract EW universe). Same discipline as L11/L16.

portfolio_FROZEN.primary_gate: LIQUID long names filing a positive-information type, market-relative net of cost
portfolio_FROZEN.corroboration: per-type CAR ranking + long-short of best-vs-worst type

cost_FROZEN: Realistic D-207-style per-stock round-trip; report realized-cost-bps, breakeven, turnover (wired when real panel present).

stats_FROZEN.nw_t: event-clustered Newey-West HAC t per type
stats_FROZEN.multiple_testing: Bonferroni across the number of tested types (guards against type-fishing)

keep_bar_FROZEN: Deploy-edge <=> a positive-information type's LIQUID market-relative net CAR > 0 AND Bonferroni-survived |NW-t| AND regime-sign-stable. Else NLP-TYPE-NOT-TRADEABLE. SCAFFOLD stage asserts pipeline-correctness only.

offline_validation_FROZEN.synthetic_self_test: Plant a post-stamp drift for ONE designated type only; assert (a) RECOVERY of that type's CAR sign-positive and |t|>=2, (b) PLACEBO (permuted type labels) |t|<2, (c) LOOK-AHEAD entry leaks more than safe t+1 entry. L11-pattern three asserts.
offline_validation_FROZEN.snapshot_characterization: Apply the taxonomy to the real data/news_cache.json (DESCRIPTIVE only): per-type article counts, share classified as OTHER -> quantify taxonomy coverage and the data gap.

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Expect NOT-RUNNABLE offline for the same reason as L16: only a tiny live news SNAPSHOT exists, no historical day-stamped text panel. This track crystallizes the NLP avenue into a pre-registered, Bonferroni-controlled, offline-validated harness and documents the gap. The taxonomy is intentionally COARSE keyword-matching (transparent, no tuned knob); a richer model is a later step once historical text exists. NO real-data edge claimed. KAP-disclosure-dominated snapshot -> shares the same approved historical-text fetch as L16 and #1 daily-PEAD.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: SCAFFOLD-SELF-TEST PASS (no deployable edge; awaiting approved historical disclosure-text fetch).
